title: Writing - Part 1: Artificial Intelligence
description: Your class has been discussing the growing role of artificial intelligence in everyday life and whether its benefits outweigh the risks.

content.question: Write an essay discussing two of the aspects in your notes. You should explain which aspect you consider most important to address, giving reasons for your opinion.

opinions: AI is likely to automate many jobs, potentially leaving large numbers of people unemployed.
AI tools can diagnose diseases faster and more accurately than human doctors in some cases.
Systems that collect and analyse personal data raise serious questions about privacy and security.

structure.intro: Introduce the topic of artificial intelligence and state the two aspects you will discuss.
structure.body1: Discuss the first aspect with examples of how it affects people.
structure.body2: Discuss the second aspect and compare its significance to the first.
structure.conclusion: State which aspect you regard as most important to address and explain why.

content.modelAnswer:
Artificial intelligence is transforming virtually every aspect of modern life, from the way we work to how we receive medical care. Two aspects that deserve particular attention are the risk of widespread job displacement and the improvements AI is bringing to healthcare.

As AI becomes more capable, many routine and even complex tasks previously performed by humans can be automated. Factory workers, administrative staff and even some professionals face the prospect of their roles being reduced or eliminated. Without careful planning and retraining programmes, this shift could lead to significant unemployment and social inequality.

On the other hand, AI is already delivering remarkable benefits in medicine. Diagnostic tools powered by machine learning can identify conditions such as cancer at earlier stages and with greater accuracy than traditional methods. This has the potential to save millions of lives and reduce the burden on healthcare systems worldwide.

In my opinion, job displacement is the more urgent issue to address. The benefits of AI in healthcare are clear, but they could be undermined if the economic disruption caused by automation is not managed fairly. Governments and businesses must invest in education and support systems to prepare workers for a world in which AI plays an ever-greater role.
